channel.title: Audio Plugin Guy - Deals Feed
channel.description: Las mejores ofertas de Audio Plugin Guy.

item.title: [SAVE BIG] Audio Plugin Deals | Get 89% off Collab Gem Bundle 300 for $35 (Normally $300).
item.description: Descuento: 89% - Desarrollador: Audio Plugin Deals - Finaliza: 2026-05-06

item.title: [HOT] PSP Audioware | Get 70% off PSP auralControl by PSP Audioware. The discounted price is $29.
[SAVE BIG] FaderPro | Plugin Alliance Pop-Up Shop Exclusive – 83% off on any FaderPro course.
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Techivation | Techivation has released Tilt EQ, a free linear phase tilt EQ plugin for Mac & Win.
[HOT] Spitfire Audio | Spitfire Audio Spring Sale – up to 50% off on all libraries. Plus, an extra 10% off when you purchase 3 or more qualifying libraries.
[SAVE BIG] HoRNet Plugins | HoRNet Plugins is offering 89% off on HoRNet SAMP master bus plugin for Atmos mixing. Use the code: SAMP89. ? ENDS SOON!
[HOT] PSP Audioware | Get 66% off PSP auralComp by PSP Audioware. The discounted price is $99.
[SAVE BIG] Kirk Hunter Studios | Get 92% off Concert Strings Adaptive by Kirk Hunter Studios for $39.99 (Normally $499.00).
item.description: Descuento: 92% - Desarrollador: Kirk Hunter Studios - Finaliza: 2026-05-11

[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] K2get | K2get has updated Chord Dock Lite, a free reharmonization and arpeggio/bassline generation plugin for Win & Mac to v1.5.

[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Aubit Sound | Get Gryfin Vol. 1 by Aubit Sound for free. Regular price $37.
[SAVE BIG] Audio Plugin Deals | Get 99% off The Ultimate 30k Loop Bundle for $30 (Normally $2400).
